C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ARNOLD W. EVJE II, PRO TEM. D. CARTER, CLERK. ERIC L. THRONE, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: CAROLE S. CULLUM, ATTY. FOR PLTF. AND DEFT. BRIAN MALLOY, PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT. SEE CLERK MINUTES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALLOY, BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 205 JONES STREET #416 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-16-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY THROUGH 9/16/99 12 P.M. DEFT. NOT TO HARASS OR THREATEN STAFF OR RESIDENTS. IF POLICE CALLED AND EMERGENCY RESTRAIN ORDER ISSUED, EVICTION TO IMMEDIATELY TAKE PLACE. EXECUTION MAY ISSUE W/O FURTHER NOTICE. DEFT. RELEASES PLTF. FROM LIA- BILITY FOR CAUSES OF ACTION FROM THIS TENANCY. SEE JDGMT.
